project.name: Byte Bridges Finance
project.tagline: Offline-first personal finance for iOS — forecasting, honesty, no bank login.

now.title: Sprint 1 — Foundations
now.detail: CoreData schema, design tokens, DataManager, onboarding skeleton

architecture.summary: iOS · SwiftUI · MVVM · offline-first CoreData · 6 feature modules + 2 shared layers. No cloud sync in v1.

modules.name: Dashboard
modules.role: Hero effective-balance, account cards, recent transactions, forecast preview
modules.detail: Computes effective balance = Σ(account balances) − Σ(recurring due ≤30 days). Pull-to-refresh. Renders a 4-week sparkline plus a safe/caution badge sourced from the Forecast module.

modules.name: Accounts
modules.role: Add, list, edit, delete financial accounts
modules.detail: Account types: current, savings, credit, cash. Delete cascades to the account's transactions (no orphans). Detail screen shows the account plus its transaction history.

modules.name: Transactions
modules.role: Add, edit, list and categorise transactions; recurring; AI hint
modules.detail: Largest module. Saving a transaction updates the linked account balance atomically. Recurring uses the RecurringFrequency enum. AI hint suggests a category from the merchant via the AIHintEngine (≥0.6 confidence threshold).

modules.name: Forecasting
modules.detail: Daily projection applying recurring transactions; emits weekly snapshots. The 8-week window is gated by SettingsViewModel.isSubscribed. Safe-to-spend = projected end balance > 0. The key product differentiator.

modules.name: Categories
modules.role: 100+ default categories, custom categories, merchant mapping
modules.detail: Seeded once from categories-seed.json on first launch. Each category carries a merchant list used by the AI hint engine. Custom categories flagged isCustom. Merchant intelligence is server-updatable in a later version.

modules.name: Settings & Paywall
modules.role: Account management, subscription status, StoreKit paywall, about/privacy
modules.detail: StoreKit 2 handles purchase, restore and receipt validation. isSubscribed is the single source of truth the Forecast module reads to gate the 8-week view. Paywall is contextual, not aggressive — triggered at the moment of intent.

modules.name: Data Layer
modules.detail: The foundation everything depends on. CoreData stack, DataManager singleton, AccountRepository + TransactionRepository (typed CRUD, throws on error). Lightweight migration strategy preserves data across app upgrades.

modules.name: UI Components
modules.role: Reusable components, colour/typography tokens, dark mode
modules.detail: Design tokens (colours in Asset Catalog, 4–64px spacing scale). Button / Card / Input / Badge components, all dark-mode-first and accessibility-labelled. Form helpers with inline validation.

dataModel.relations: belongs to User · has many → Transaction

sprints.name: Foundations
sprints.deliverable: Runnable app with dummy data, design system locked
sprints.goal: Stand up the skeleton everything else builds on — data layer, design system, and app shell. Nothing here is blocked; this is the critical-path starter.

tasks.name: Define CoreData model
tasks.ac: All 5 entities (User, Account, Transaction, Category, RecurringPattern) with attributes + relationships; model compiles

tasks.name: DataManager singleton
tasks.ac: Typed fetch/save helpers; unit-tested against in-memory store

tasks.name: Repository pattern
tasks.ac: AccountRepository + TransactionRepository; typed CRUD; throws on error

tasks.name: Migration test harness
tasks.ac: Can simulate v1→v2 schema migration with no data loss in tests

tasks.name: Design tokens
tasks.ac: All colours in Asset Catalog; 4–64px spacing scale as constants

tasks.name: Core components
tasks.ac: Button/Card/Input/Badge match design spec; dark mode; SwiftUI previews

tasks.name: Form helpers
tasks.ac: Reusable validated text field with inline error state

tasks.name: OnboardingState + gating
tasks.ac: Resolves notStarted / needsFirstAccount / canViewDashboard correctly

tasks.name: Welcome + first-account skeleton
tasks.ac: Welcome screen routes to AddAccount when no accounts exist

sprints.name: Core Data Mgmt
sprints.deliverable: Add account, see balance, manage accounts
sprints.goal: Make the app genuinely usable for accounts and categories, and stand up the dashboard shell. First slice of real value.

tasks.name: AddAccountForm
tasks.ac: Validates required fields; currency defaults to GBP; saves on submit

tasks.name: Wire form to AccountRepository
tasks.ac: New account persists; appears in list immediately

tasks.name: Account type picker
tasks.ac: Picker shows current/savings/credit/cash; selection persists

tasks.name: AccountList view
tasks.ac: Lists accounts with name/type/balance; pull-to-refresh

tasks.name: Account Detail screen
tasks.ac: Shows account info plus its transactions

tasks.name: Edit account
tasks.ac: Changes persist; validation on empty name

tasks.name: Delete account (cascade)
tasks.ac: Confirm dialog; deletes account and its transactions; no orphans

tasks.name: Author categories-seed.json
tasks.ac: 100+ entries, each with name/colour/icon/merchants

tasks.name: CategoryMigration seeding
tasks.ac: Categories seeded once; not duplicated on relaunch

tasks.name: Category list + colour coding
tasks.ac: All categories display; searchable; correct colour swatches

tasks.name: Lightweight migration + versioning
tasks.ac: App upgrade preserves data; version bump tested

tasks.name: Dashboard skeleton
tasks.ac: Shows effective balance number; placeholder for the rest

sprints.name: Transactions
sprints.goal: The core loop: record, edit and categorise money movements, with recurring patterns feeding the forecast.

tasks.name: AddTransaction modal
tasks.ac: Date/amount/payee/account/category/notes; date defaults today; amount validated as currency

tasks.name: Wire to repo + update balance
tasks.ac: Saving a transaction updates the linked account balance atomically

tasks.name: Transaction list
tasks.ac: Newest-first; category colour + amount sign

tasks.name: Edit flow (pre-filled)
tasks.ac: Tapping a transaction opens a pre-filled editor

tasks.name: Recalc balance on edit/delete
tasks.ac: Editing amount adjusts balance; delete reverses it

tasks.name: Transaction detail view
tasks.ac: Shows full detail incl. notes

tasks.name: RecurringFrequency enum + fields
tasks.ac: 8 cases; stored on Transaction; nextOccurrence() correct

tasks.name: Recurring toggle + picker
tasks.ac: Toggle reveals frequency picker; selection persists

tasks.name: Recurring-due query helper
tasks.ac: Returns recurring transactions due within an N-week window

tasks.name: AIHintEngine
tasks.ac: Returns category + confidence; suggests at threshold ≥0.6

tasks.name: Wire hint into Add UI
tasks.ac: Suggestion appears as payee typed; Use/Skip buttons work

sprints.name: Forecast & Paywall
sprints.goal: Ship the differentiator (forecast) and the business model (paywall). Highest-risk sprint — StoreKit is the wildcard.

tasks.name: Forecast algorithm
tasks.ac: Projects balance applying recurring txns; returns weekly snapshots

tasks.name: Forecast chart (SwiftUI)
tasks.ac: Line chart with week markers; renders 4 or 8 weeks

tasks.name: Dashboard forecast preview
tasks.ac: Dashboard shows 4-week sparkline + safe/caution badge

tasks.name: Safe-to-spend calculation
tasks.ac: Green if projected end balance > 0; red otherwise; configurable threshold

tasks.name: Indicator component
tasks.ac: Clear green/red visual with label

tasks.name: StoreKit 2 integration
tasks.ac: Purchase + restore; subscription state persists; sandbox-tested

tasks.name: Paywall conditional logic
tasks.ac: Free sees 4 weeks + upgrade prompt; paid sees 8 weeks

tasks.name: Paywall modal
tasks.ac: Shows free vs paid; purchase button triggers StoreKit

tasks.name: Settings + subscription status
tasks.ac: Shows current tier + renewal/expiry; restore button

sprints.name: QA & Polish
sprints.goal: Make it accessible, fast and stable. Accessibility shouldn't start here — but it's verified and signed off here.

tasks.name: Accessibility pass (VoiceOver, contrast, Dynamic Type)
tasks.ac: Every interactive element labelled; text ≥4.5:1; scales without clipping

tasks.name: Bug triage + fixes
tasks.ac: All P0/P1 bugs resolved; crash-free >99.5% in testing

tasks.name: Performance profiling
tasks.ac: Dashboard loads <2s; lists scroll at 60fps on iPhone 11

tasks.name: Dark mode polish + reduced-motion
tasks.ac: All screens reviewed in dark mode; animations reduced when system set

sprints.name: Launch Prep
sprints.goal: Everything non-code needed to ship: store assets, legal, and the final build.

tasks.name: App Store screenshots
tasks.ac: Screenshots for 6.7"/6.1"/5.5" showing key screens

tasks.name: Privacy policy + nutrition label
tasks.ac: Policy hosted; App Privacy questions answered accurately

tasks.name: App Store listing copy + keywords
tasks.ac: Listing finalised; keywords researched

tasks.name: Final TestFlight build + testers
tasks.ac: Build uploaded; ≥10 external testers invited

sprints.name: Review & v1.1 Start
sprints.goal: Get through App Review and start the reports/AI-learning work in parallel.

tasks.name: App Store review iteration
tasks.ac: Respond to review feedback; app approved and live

tasks.name: Reports module
tasks.ac: Spending grouped by category with %, count, trend; PDF export (free), CSV (paid)

tasks.name: AI learning prep (schema)
tasks.ac: Schema to capture user category corrections

sprints.name: v1.1 Features
sprints.goal: The learning categorisation and insights that competitors haven't nailed. Tight — widgets may slip to v1.2.

tasks.name: AI auto-categorisation (learning)
tasks.ac: Learned mappings prioritised over defaults; never overwrites a manual entry

tasks.name: Advanced insights (paid)
tasks.ac: Generates 3–5 honest insights from spending; gated to paid

tasks.name: Balance widget
tasks.ac: Home-screen widget shows effective balance; updates daily

risks.name: CoreData migrations
risks.mitigation: Test harness in Sprint 1, rigorous testing

risks.name: Accessibility WCAG AA
risks.mitigation: Build in throughout, not just wk9

simulation.note: Monte Carlo over sprint velocity + risk-driven delays. Targets weeks-to-submission (Sprints 1–6).

devlog.title: Living atlas — drill-down added
devlog.body: Upgraded the living doc to a navigable atlas: every sprint and module is now clickable through to its own detail view, with tasks, acceptance criteria, dependencies and the architecture teardown.

devlog.title: Planning track complete
devlog.body: All phases done: design system, engineering estimation, sprint plan, 6 architecture gaps resolved, story breakdown (20 stories → 60+ tickets), pricing locked, beta plan. Sprint 1 unblocked.

devlog.title: Pricing finalised
devlog.body: Single tier £3.99/mo or £29.99/yr (37% saving). Undercuts Emma Plus (£4.99) and Snoop (£5.99). 'No bank login, ever' as a privacy differentiator vs YNAB.
